overview: A dashboard for managing 5G lab test automation. Features a polished header with logo and user profile, plus a dynamic list of test rows — each with a Test ID editor, Request Type selector, details display, and a Start button.
features: Header with 5G Lab Test Automator logo and title
User profile section with name and avatar
Dynamic test rows with add (+) button
Request Type dropdown (UE Capa / NV Filtering)
Start button to trigger each test
